title: tragacantha ovalis
intro: Tragacantha ovalis, also known as the Lesser Burnet, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Tragacantha ovalis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
